leadText: Rain Dance has several referrals: For the move introduced in Generation II, see Rain Dance (move) For the deck archetype in the Pokémon Trading Card Game, see Raindance (TCG) For the deck listed in the Pokémon Trading Card Game Player's Guide, see Rain Dance (TCG) For the deck listed in the Pokémon Trading Card Game Fossil Expansion Player's Guide, see Fossilized Rain Dance (TCG) For the deck listed in the Let's Play Pokémon guide, see Raindance (Let's Play Pokémon)
